Petition To Reform Trust Term To Reflect Settlor'S Actual Specific Intent
Off Calendar Jul-20-2021 Continued To Oct-19-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Frank Busch, via ZOOM, for Kathleen Miller, Respondent; Anthony Maticciani, via ZOOM, for Sophie Nunberg, Petitioner.

The court begins by disclosing to counsel the Judges' professional relationship with Judge Peter Busch, who is the father of Frank Busch and asks if there is any objection to the hearing moving forward. No objections are presented. Mr. Matricciani reports that his focus has been on attempting to gather as much information as he can from the Trustee but that he has not been able to receive any. Mr. Busch reports that his clients' statutory obligation was to comply with the decedent's desires. There is brief discussion between the court and counsel and the court advises counsel that it intends to set Case Management hearing dates and a trial date - an order thereon will follow. Counsel is amenable to the court's suggestion.

The Petition to Reform Trust, etc., is continued to October 19, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
